name: mcps-monorepo
description: Monorepo MCP — Personal Agent OS, openapi-engine e Servidor MCP

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @mcps/shared && npm run build -w @mcps/openapi-engine && npm run build -w @mcps/agent-os
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mcps/shared && npm run typecheck -w @mcps/openapi-engine && npm run typecheck -w @mcps/agent-os
